title: Kolsch and Altbier
summary: Some German city styles are top-fermented ales.

signals.title: Altbier
signals.body: Amber, firmer, and maltier with a dry finish.

signals.title: Lesson
signals.body: German beer culture is regional, not monolithic.

guardrails.title: Name cities
guardrails.body: The geography helps the styles make sense.

guardrails.title: Avoid rivalry
guardrails.body: Compare profiles without forcing a winner.

guardrails.title: Freshness
guardrails.body: Both styles are best close to the source.
